summary: Full regression testing completed for Quadley Mobile App. Backend API tests: 18/19 passed (95%). All key mobile features verified through code review. Web frontend login has rate limiting issue (429) but API login works correctly.

minor.issue: Endpoint returns 404 - notifications list endpoint not found
Rate limiting (429) triggered after multiple login attempts - affects web frontend testing

integration_issues.issue: RA login failed due to rate limiting (429) after multiple attempts. Admin login works correctly.

RA_Floor_Events_openCreate.details: RAFloorEventsScreen.js line 27-28: openCreateImmediately = route?.params?.openCreate === true; modalVisible initialized with this value

HomeScreen_RA_Tools_New_Event.details: HomeScreen.js line 209: RA Tools 'New Event' passes { openCreate: true } params to RAFloorEvents

FloorScreen_Create_Event_Button.details: FloorScreen.js lines 173, 217: Both FAB and button pass { openCreate: true } to RAFloorEvents

Announcements_Read_Sorting.details: AnnouncementsScreen.js lines 70-87: sortedAnnouncements sorts read items to bottom using readAnnouncements state

CoCurricular_Joined_Sorting.details: CoCurricularScreen.js lines 76-84: filteredActivities sorts joined activities to top; line 146 shows 'Joined' badge

SafeDisclosure_Keyboard_Fix.details: SafeDisclosureScreen.js: blurOnSubmit={false}, returnKeyType='next', keyboardShouldPersistTaps='handled' - prevents keyboard dismissal

Push_Notifications_Logout_Fix.details: NotificationContext.js line 96-98: useEffect cleanup calls removeListeners(); line 112: subscription?.remove() uses optional chaining

Login_RA.details: API login works: epink@icloud.com returns role=ra, floor='Level 1 - Wing A'

Login_Admin.details: API login works: epinker@icloud.com returns role=admin

Create_Event_API.details: POST /api/events with category field creates event successfully

action_items: Consider implementing /api/notifications endpoint for mobile app notification list
Review rate limiting settings - may be too aggressive for testing scenarios
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ All 14+ modules properly organized in HomeScreen with correct navigation
✓ RA Tools section only visible to RA users (isRA check on line 204)
✓ openCreate param properly implemented across RAFloorEventsScreen, HomeScreen, and FloorScreen
✓ Keyboard handling in SafeDisclosureScreen uses correct React Native patterns
✓ Push notification cleanup uses optional chaining to prevent crashes
✓ Category tabs in CoCurricularScreen properly filter activities
Note: Events API requires 'category' field - mobile app should include this when creating events

success_rate.frontend: Web frontend tested - admin login works, RA login rate-limited

test_credentials_used.admin: epinker@icloud.com / AbC!123! (works via API and web)

seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: All key mobile features verified through code review. Backend APIs working correctly. Web frontend has rate limiting that may affect testing - wait a few minutes between login attempts. The mobile app is an Expo React Native app - actual UI testing requires Expo Go on a physical device. Notifications endpoint (/api/notifications) returns 404 - may need to be implemented.
